subject: english
description: be動詞の過去形 was / were を使って「〜でした」「〜にいた」を表します。

questions.question: I ___ happy yesterday.
questions.explanation: Iの過去形には was を使います

questions.question: I ___ a student last year.
questions.explanation: Iの過去形には was を使います

questions.question: I ___ tired yesterday.
questions.explanation: Iの過去形には was を使います

questions.question: They ___ at home yesterday.
questions.explanation: 複数形の過去形には were を使います

questions.question: He ___ hungry this morning.
questions.explanation: 三人称単数の過去形には was を使います

questions.question: She ___ happy yesterday.
questions.explanation: 三人称単数の過去形には was を使います

questions.question: We ___ students last year.
questions.explanation: 複数形の過去形には were を使います

questions.question: You ___ tired yesterday.
questions.explanation: Youの過去形には were を使います
